tagline: Moroccan comfort food, weekend brunch, and neighborhood warmth since 1983.
about: Cafe Mogador is a long-running East Village favorite known for tagines, couscous, mezze, and brunch tables that feel casual, lively, and unmistakably New York.

services.name: Chicken Tagine
services.desc: Slow-cooked chicken with preserved lemon, olives, herbs, and warm Moroccan spices.

services.name: Weekend Brunch
services.desc: Eggs, Moroccan flavors, fresh bread, and the kind of room that fills early.

services.name: Mezze Spread
services.desc: Shareable dips, salads, and small plates built for a relaxed table.

address: 101 St Marks Pl, New York, NY 10009
hours: Daily hours vary; check before visiting.
